div.p: Hugh by the grace of God Bishop of Dunkeld, to all who shall view or hear the present document, wishes eternal salvation in the Lord. You all should know that, out of grace and godly piety, we have remitted and quitclaimed in perpetuity to the abbot and canons of Inchaffray the cain and conveth that the clergy of the church of Dunkeld were accustomed to receive at Madderty from the land which in Gaelic is called ‘apdaine’. For the perpetual strength of this quitclaim, we have affixed our seal to this document. As witness, the Chapter of Dunkeld.
